title: xanthocephalum ramulosum
intro: Xanthocephalum ramulosum, also known as yerba de la lagrima, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Xanthocephalum ramulosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
